creator: mattp@conundrum.com
text:
diff -ruN sarah.0.3b/Makefile sarah/Makefile
--- sarah.0.3b/Makefile	Mon Jan 17 19:07:55 2000
+++ sarah/Makefile	Thu Jul  6 23:04:29 2000
@@ -1,12 +1,13 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	sarah
-# Version required:	0.3b
-# Date created:		10 Jan 2000
+# Version required:	0.4b
+# Date created:		06 Jul 2000
 # Whom:				Matthew Pounsett <mattp@conundrum.com>
 #
 # $FreeBSD$
 #
 
-DISTNAME=		sarah-0.3b
+PORTNAME=		sarah
+PORTVERSION=	0.4b
 CATEGORIES=		sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.conundrum.com/pub/sarah/
 
diff -ruN sarah.0.3b/files/md5 sarah/files/md5
--- sarah.0.3b/files/md5	Mon Jan 17 18:25:34 2000
+++ sarah/files/md5	Thu Jul  6 22:52:31 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (sarah-0.3b.tar.gz) = b3bb9066202d068fe982b5b0565cd30b
+MD5 (sarah-0.4b.tar.gz) = 098d647c0af7370a028b4da1be7e9e50
